scripts.release: pnpm build && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version;const {execSync}=require('child_process');require('fs').mkdirSync('releases',{recursive:true});const out='../releases/structflow-v'+v+'.zip';execSync('rm -f '+out+' && zip -r '+out+' .',{cwd:'dist',stdio:'inherit'});console.log('Created releases/structflow-v'+v+'.zip');"
scripts.package:chrome: pnpm build && node scripts/build-browser-manifest.cjs chrome && node scripts/package-extension.cjs chrome
scripts.package:edge: pnpm build && node scripts/build-browser-manifest.cjs edge && node scripts/package-extension.cjs edge
scripts.package:firefox: pnpm build && node scripts/build-browser-manifest.cjs firefox && node scripts/package-extension.cjs firefox
